microsoft_ft: Architected and operationalized an end-to-end **governance gate process** for Azure resilience validation, enforcing rigorous entry/exit criteria that scaled a 2-person operation into a platformized system sustaining **45+ annual launch-readiness drills** and $14M+ business impact.

Facilitated cross-functional **Go/No-Go decisions** as the standing lead for recovery executions, orchestrating consensus across Product, IT, and engineering stakeholders to validate operational and technical requirements before any global rollout went live.

Led 0→1 delivery of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, translating cross-functional commercial and operational needs into seamless technical requirements that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and shifted execution to a scalable self-service model.

Pioneered Azure’s first proactive resilience testing capability, defining levels of change and standardized engagement models to ship a rack-level drill program in 4 months at a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects pre-launch.

Drove **data-informed decisions** by establishing a KPI dashboard tracking speed-to-market, defect rates, and revenue-at-risk, giving executive leadership transparent insight into launch pipeline health across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp programs.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as **bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract without direct authority over participating teams.

Championed change management by building playbooks, training modules, and an internal AI agent that restructured planning workflows, **cutting cycle time 39%** and raising drill capacity 21% while embedding readiness into the org’s operating DNA.
microsoft_2023: Championed product adoption for AI-driven code generation workflows by running user demos and training modules across **14 key teams**, driving utilization that saved 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerated cross-functional onboarding.

Influenced the program roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ stakeholder interviews** with Azure service teams, translating critical feature gaps into prioritized, actionable milestones.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and standardizing knowledge access for partner teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment among 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning operational and delivery workstreams.

Mobilized a program strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support by engineering a **Power BI KPI dashboard** that tracked operational toil and program health across 140+ teams in near real time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations to enforce clear go/no-go criteria.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize a fragile developer intake process across teams.
Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release friction.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing quote-to-cash operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a **digital-first go-to-market strategy**, optimizing the website and Google Business profile for discoverability.
Improved leadership pricing models by running **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and seal margin leaks, informing data-driven commercial decisions.

tailoring_notes: Swapped all titles to Program Manager variants to mirror the 'Program Manager, Commercial Readiness' JD.
Recast the resilience-validation gate program as an end-to-end governance/Go-No-Go model with entry/exit criteria, KPI dashboards, and change management to match the CRB framing.
Surfaced quote-to-cash, PLM, and commercial-readiness vocabulary; reframed Pro Painters invoicing/scoping as quote-to-cash to hit a critical JD domain.
Emphasized leading without direct authority, executive artifacts, and KPI dashboards (speed-to-market, defect rates, revenue-at-risk) per the JD's analytical-rigor and facilitation asks.
